node.name: Alo Restaurant
node.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

node.name: Kaiseki Kaji
node.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

node.name: Canoe Restaurant
node.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

node.name: Lee Restaurant
node.description: Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > 360 Restaurant at CN Tower

node.name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower
node.description: Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch.

node.name: Antler Kitchen
node.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Elements on the Falls

node.name: Elements on the Falls
node.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

node.name: Cluny Bistro
node.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

node.name: Lady Marmalade
node.description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Mildred's Temple Kitchen

node.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
node.description: Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.
